hero.title: Hey, I’m Oumy Full-Stack Developer
hero.description: Passionate developer focused on building reliable, high-performance, and user-centered web applications. I enjoy turning complex problems into clear, efficient, and maintainable solutions.

about.title: about
description: Through personal and professional projects, I’ve developed a user-oriented approach with a strong focus on code quality and maintainability.
I work on applications involving data management, dashboards, and interactive interfaces, aiming to deliver clear and useful features.
Curious and detail-oriented, I pursue continuous learning to improve both my technical skills and user experience.

contacts.title: contacts
contacts.text: I’m looking to join an innovative company where I can apply my web development and artificial intelligence skills to high-value projects.

description: Full-Stack Developer passionate about building modern, high-performance, and accessible web applications.
I enjoy turning ideas into concrete solutions, with a strong focus on architecture, user experience, and maintainability.
I continuously seek to learn and grow my skills through new projects and technologies.

facts.title: fun facts
list: I can drink a liter of water in one go
My favorite movie is The Woman King
I enjoy solving problems more than explaining them.

experience_pro.title: professional experience
list: End-to-end development of a CRM (Figma mockups, React + Vite, AdonisJS)
Performance optimization and caching with Redis
Application containerization (Node.js, Prisma, Redis) using Docker
AI project: OpenAI-based assistant to automate ERP contracts via XML
Business requirements analysis and ERP process optimization
Creation and optimization of SQL views and queries
list2: Application architecture design following the MVC pattern
Setup of a relational database (PostgreSQL with Prisma)
Development of a mobile interface using React Native
Design and execution of functional test plans to validate key features
